full_text:
Dan, Duke Wen of Zhou 周文公旦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dan, Duke Wen of Zhou (周文公旦). Zhou Dynasty. Consolidated the kingdom established by elder brother King Wu. Dan, Duke Wen of Zhou was an historic figure affiliated with Zhou Dynasty.
